allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
OmniCapital v8 COMPASS - New algorithm with real signal

Replace random stock selection with cross-sectional momentum \(90d + 5d reversal skip\),
SPY SMA200 regime filter, inverse volatility sizing, and dynamic leverage via vol targeting.
Results: 16.16% CAGR, 0.73 Sharpe, -34.8% max DD \(vs v6: 5.40% CAGR, 0.22 Sharpe, -59.4% DD\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add COMPASS v8 algorithm manifesto

Complete technical documentation of the v8 COMPASS algorithm:
philosophy, signal logic, regime filter, vol targeting, parameters,
historical behavior, risks, and implementation details.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add COMPASS v8.1 long-short backtest with Revenue/Debt shorts

Long-short strategy: 80% longs \(momentum top-5\) + 20% shorts \(bottom-10
by Revenue/Total Debt ratio\). Backtest limited to 2021-2026 \(period with
real fundamental data from yfinance\).

Results \(5.1 years\): 17.97% CAGR, 0.58 Sharpe, -46.3% max DD.
Short side lost money \(-$13.5k, 34.75% win rate\) because worst ratio
stocks are mostly banks where high debt is structural, not distress.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
